abyssal-aquarium.prompt: A cinematic 16:9 desktop wallpaper looking through the enormous curved glass wall of a deep-sea abyssal aquarium, viewed from a softly lit gallery on the right third. Layered silhouettes of jellyfish, lanternfish, and drifting kelp recede into inky navy-black water. Soft bioluminescent teals, cyans, and violets bloom behind a silent whale shark silhouette crossing the upper-left mid-ground. Shafts of pale cold light drift down from above, refracting through rising bubbles and dust motes. Painterly illustration, high contrast, 8k textural detail, Studio Ghibli-meets-Syd Mead mood. Keep the lower-left third relatively calm and readable for desktop icons; no text, no logos, no people, no HUD, no UI, no captions, no watermarks, no signatures. Absolutely nothing spelling out letters or numbers.

circuit-garden.prompt: A cinematic 16:9 desktop wallpaper of a living motherboard overgrown by a glowing microscopic jungle. Emerald copper traces branch into vines, solder-blossoms unfold into neon tulips and bioluminescent orchids, capacitor mushrooms puff golden spores. Warm dawn light filters from upper right through a mist of tiny data fireflies, catching dew on tiny heatsink ferns. Rich saturated palette: teal, chartreuse, electric violet, honey gold, deep forest. Painterly macro photography-meets-Moebius illustration, 8k detail, shallow focus. Keep the lower-left half calmer and slightly darker for desktop icon readability; no text, no typography, no logos, no UI, no captions, no watermarks, no signatures, no letters, no numbers.

pocket-dimension.prompt: A cinematic 16:9 desktop wallpaper of an impossible pocket dimension: a warm Victorian drawing room is breaking apart into floating islands of rug, armchair, bookshelf, and staircase, orbiting a luminous oval portal in the upper right. The portal bends starlight into a subtle lens flare and warps the sky behind it. A matte-painting nebula fills the background in indigo, magenta, and coral, with drifting dust motes catching gold rim-light. Long soft shadows, Dutch angle tilt, slight fisheye. Inspired by Studio Laika stop-motion + Moebius + Inception. Keep the lower-left third open sky for desktop icons; no text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no UI, no HUD, no captions, no people, no watermarks, no signatures.

weather-factory.prompt: A cinematic 16:9 desktop wallpaper of a whimsical sky-borne weather factory: a steampunk-cartoon cloud machine floats above a calm sea of pastel cumulus at dawn. Copper conveyor belts carry finished raindrops, snowflakes, and autumn leaves along the right two-thirds; brass pipes vent controlled storm wisps; a tesla-coil lightning spire sparks in the upper right; a valve on the left gently sprinkles a micro-rainbow down into a hole in the clouds. Sunrise pinks, peach, butter yellow, cerulean shadows, copper accents. Painterly Pixar short-film concept art, 8k detail, soft volumetrics. Keep the lower-left third as calm open sky readable for desktop icons; no text, no letters, no numbers, no brand names, no logos, no signage, no captions, no UI, no HUD, no watermarks, no signatures.
